_meta.description: Official-source model registry for API models and product-scoped model availability.
_meta.source_policy: Use only official provider documentation, official pricing pages, or official product entitlement pages. Do not infer unpublished model IDs or prices.
notes: Root keys other than _meta are provider or product scopes; each scope value is an array of model objects.
Product scopes such as codex-*, gemini-cli, aistudio, and antigravity reflect availability or entitlements, not separate model vendors.
Legacy and snapshot entries are retained when official model or pricing pages still list them.
When consuming this file, ignore _meta or explicitly select root values whose type is array.
Root scopes can be direct model vendors, cloud model platforms, or product entitlement scopes; use _meta.scope_types when a consumer must distinguish them.
A provider scope is expanded only from official model/pricing documentation. Aggregators are excluded unless added as their own clearly labeled scope.
Chinese cloud/platform pricing is recorded in CNY with the official per-token unit when the source uses CNY.
Image-generation model entries may include api_endpoints, image_generation option metadata, feature flags, and tiered rate-limit notes when the official model or guide pages publish them.
